name: Trip Report & Experience Log
description: Guided template for structured substance experience reporting with automatic live timeline logging capability.

rating_options.name: Uneventful
rating_options.description: No noticeable effects or plain baseline.

rating_options.name: Mild
rating_options.description: Light, subtle, easily ignored background effects.

rating_options.name: Moderate
rating_options.description: Clear effects, noticeable but comfortable and structured.

rating_options.name: Strong
rating_options.description: Deep headspace, distinct visual or sensory changes, fully immersive.

rating_options.name: Overwhelming
rating_options.description: Intense, extremely challenging to direct, heavy ego dissolution.

fields.label: Set (Mindset)
fields.placeholder: Current mindset, emotional baseline, and expectations...

fields.label: Setting (Environment)
fields.placeholder: Setting description: location, lighting, music, trip sitters...

fields.label: Visual Effects
fields.placeholder: Double vision, enhancements, morphing, recursion, CEVs/OEVs...

fields.label: Physical Effects
fields.placeholder: Body load, tactile enhancement, heart rate, stimulation/sedation...

fields.label: Cognitive Effects
fields.placeholder: Headspace change, time distortion, anxiety, memory suppression, euphoria...

fields.label: Experience Timeline & Logging
fields.placeholder: Automatic live entries from interactive widget add here, or write manually in this box.

fields.label: Main Lesson / Conclusion
fields.placeholder: Summarize the primary takeaways, core insights, and overall integration lessons.

fields.label: Side Effects & Hangover
fields.placeholder: Comedown notes, next-day hangover, muscle tension, headaches, sleep issues...
